message:
feat(cli): add -a short flag for workers probe --all

Add -a as shorthand for --all in the workers probe subcommand,
allowing faster invocation: `rch workers probe -a` instead of
`rch workers probe --all`.

Follows the established pattern of adding short flags for commonly
used options to improve CLI ergonomics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
